title: (Bullish Signal) ASTE, enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Nov 10, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that ASTE's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron A.I.dvisor backtested 85 similar cases where ASTE's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 74 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $54.73 crossed the support line at $54.98 and is trading between $54.98 support and $53.56 support lines. Throughout the month of 10/09/20 - 11/10/20, the price experienced a -4% Downtrend, while the week of 11/03/20 - 11/10/20 shows a +3% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/crpxo2047ny51.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=173c0ae9800e5eade3d066509f40b762e089a394

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where ASTE's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 30 of 36 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 44 of 57 cases where ASTE's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

ASTE moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 09, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +12.01% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ASTE advanced for three days, in 235 of 306 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

ASTE may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
